data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Opt-out handling with audit trail', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail but does not provide specific evidence of how opt-out requests are handled or recorded. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the implementation of opt-out handling and its audit trail.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of opt-out handling with an audit trail.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify opt-out handling and audit trail.
